distilleries.name: Osborne Brandy de Jerez
distilleries.address: Calle Los Moros 7, 11500 El Puerto de Santa Maria, Spain
distilleries.description: Osborne produces a widely distributed Brandy de Jerez range, with Veterano among the most widely sold branded brandies in Spain. The aguardiente is distilled from La Mancha Airen grapes and aged in Osborne sherry butts under the solera system at the El Puerto complex.
distilleries.distillation_method: Continuous column distillation of Airen grape spirit; aged in Palomino Fino sherry butts under solera criadera system
distilleries.tasting_program: Brandy and sherry combined tour with Gran Reserva and standard tasting from EUR 20; private Magno Solera Gran Reserva vertical on request

verified.address_quoted: C/ Los Moros, 7, 11500 El Puerto de Santa Maria

distilleries.name: Gonzalez Byass Lepanto Brandy de Jerez
distilleries.address: Calle Manuel Maria Gonzalez 12, 11403 Jerez de la Frontera, Spain
distilleries.description: Gonzalez Byass produces the Lepanto range of Brandy de Jerez alongside the mass-market Soberano. The Lepanto Solera Gran Reserva is aged in the same La Concha cellar as Tio Pepe, using only sherry butts from the house's own range for the final ageing stage.
distilleries.distillation_method: Holandas (pot still) distillation for Lepanto premium range; column still for Soberano; aged in Palomino Fino and Pedro Ximenez solera butts
distilleries.tasting_program: Brandy element included in standard bodega tour; Lepanto Solera Gran Reserva premium tasting available as add-on from EUR 25

verified.address_quoted: C. Manuel Maria Gonzalez, 12, 11403 Jerez de la Frontera

distilleries.name: Williams and Humbert Gran Duque de Alba
distilleries.address: Calle Nuno de Canas 1, 11408 Jerez de la Frontera, Spain
spirits_produced: Gran Duque de Alba Solera Gran Reserva
distilleries.description: The Gran Duque de Alba range from Williams and Humbert is among the most decorated Brandy de Jerez Solera Gran Reserva expressions. Spirit is aged exclusively in Williams and Humbert Palo Cortado and Oloroso butts for a minimum of ten years.
distilleries.distillation_method: Holandas pot still distillation; maturation exclusively in Williams and Humbert sherry butts under criadera and solera system
distilleries.tasting_program: Gran Duque de Alba tasting included in premium tour option; standalone brandy session from EUR 25

verified.address_quoted: C/ Nuno de Canas, 1, 11408 Jerez de la Frontera

distilleries.name: Sanchez Romate Cardenal Mendoza
distilleries.address: Calle Lealas 26, 11403 Jerez de la Frontera, Spain
distilleries.description: Sanchez Romate's Cardenal Mendoza is a long-established Brandy de Jerez Solera Gran Reserva label widely distributed in Spain and export markets. The spirit is aged a minimum of twelve years in Romate's own Oloroso and Amontillado solera butts, producing a complex, mahogany-coloured spirit.
distilleries.distillation_method: Holandas pot still distillation from Airen grapes; minimum 12 years in Romate sherry butts under triple-criadera solera
distilleries.tasting_program: Cardenal Mendoza tasting included in premium bodega visit; Carta Real and Anada 1908 comparison session on request

verified.address_quoted: C/ Lealas, 26, 11403 Jerez de la Frontera

distilleries.name: Fundador Domecq Brandy de Jerez
distilleries.address: Calle San Ildefonso 3, 11403 Jerez de la Frontera, Spain
distilleries.description: The Fundador brand, now under Beam Suntory, continues the Pedro Domecq brandy tradition from the historic Jerez cellar complex. Carlos I Solera Gran Reserva and the Centenario range represent the premium tier of the Fundador portfolio.
distilleries.distillation_method: Column and pot still distillation; Solera Gran Reserva aged minimum 10 years in Domecq sherry butts under the solera system
distilleries.tasting_program: Brandy and sherry combined tour including Fundador and Carlos I from EUR 16

verified.address_quoted: C/ San Ildefonso, 3, Jerez de la Frontera

distilleries.name: Bodegas Tradicion Brandy de Jerez
distilleries.address: Calle Cordobeses 3, 11403 Jerez de la Frontera, Spain
distilleries.description: Bodegas Tradicion produces a Brandy de Jerez Solera Gran Reserva aged in the same 30-year-minimum solera butts that contain its VORS sherries. The brandy production is small and sold primarily through the bodega shop and the tasting room visit.
distilleries.distillation_method: Holandas pot still distillation; aged exclusively in old Tradicion sherry butts, minimum 10 years Solera Gran Reserva
distilleries.tasting_program: Brandy included as an optional addition to the standard VORS sherry visit; combined sherry and brandy vertical from EUR 55

verified.address_quoted: C/ Cordobeses, 3, Jerez de la Frontera

distilleries.name: Bobadilla Gran Capitan Brandy de Jerez
distilleries.address: Calle Beato Juan Grande 1, 11403 Jerez de la Frontera, Spain
distilleries.description: Bobadilla produces the Gran Capitan and 103 ranges of Brandy de Jerez from its Jerez cellar, now part of the Beam Suntory portfolio alongside Fundador. The 103 Etiqueta Blanca is among the most widely sold brandy brands in Spain by volume.
distilleries.distillation_method: Column distillation from Airen and Palomino grapes; solera ageing in sherry butts
distilleries.tasting_program: Available by prior arrangement for trade groups

distilleries.name: Bodegas Lustau Brandy de Jerez
distilleries.address: Calle Arcos 53, 11402 Jerez de la Frontera, Spain
distilleries.description: Lustau produces a Brandy de Jerez Solera and Solera Gran Reserva from its Santiago quarter bodega, using the same oak infrastructure as the almacenista sherry operation. The Lustau Solera Gran Reserva is aged a minimum of fifteen years in Lustau's own Oloroso and Amontillado butts.
distilleries.distillation_method: Holandas pot still distillation; Solera Gran Reserva minimum 15 years in Lustau sherry butts
distilleries.tasting_program: Brandy tasting available as add-on to standard Lustau bodega tour from EUR 15

verified.address_quoted: C/ Arcos, 53, 11402 Jerez de la Frontera

distilleries.name: Pedro Domecq Solera Gran Reserva
distilleries.address: Calle San Ildefonso 3, 11403 Jerez de la Frontera, Spain
spirits_produced: Pedro Domecq Decanter Solera Gran Reserva
distilleries.description: The Pedro Domecq brand name lives on as a premium tier within the Beam Suntory Jerez portfolio, producing a Solera Gran Reserva aged in Pedro Domecq's historic sherry butt soleras. The 1730 expression commemorates the founding year of the Domecq dynasty in Jerez.
distilleries.distillation_method: Holandas pot still distillation; Solera Gran Reserva aged minimum 12 years in historic Domecq sherry butts
distilleries.tasting_program: Included in the Fundador premium tour; standalone Pedro Domecq session by arrangement

verified.address_quoted: C/ San Ildefonso, 3, Jerez de la Frontera

distilleries.name: Valdespino Brandy de Jerez
distilleries.address: Calle Ponce 2, 11402 Jerez de la Frontera, Spain
distilleries.description: Valdespino produces a Brandy de Jerez Solera Gran Reserva from the historic Jerez bodega now operated by the Jose Estevez group. The spirit is aged in Valdespino's own Amontillado and Oloroso solera butts alongside the VORS sherry programme.
distilleries.distillation_method: Holandas pot still distillation; aged in Valdespino sherry butts under solera system
distilleries.tasting_program: Brandy included in the premium Valdespino tour; paired with VORS Amontillado or Oloroso on request

verified.address_quoted: C/ Ponce, 2, Jerez de la Frontera
